title: mentha × villosa var. tenorei
intro: Mentha × villosa var. tenorei, also known as Corsican mint, is a natural hybrid plant of the mint family, characterized by its distinctive white flowers and hairy leaves. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to relieve digestive issues, alleviate nausea and headaches, and exhibit antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Corsican mint include its potential to soothe digestive problems, reduce stress, and improve respiratory issues, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Corsican mint can be consumed in various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing individuals to harness its medicinal and therapeutic properties.
